title: Gluttony
content:
There was a young person named Ned,
    Who dined before going to bed,
     On lobster and ham
     And salad and jam,
    And when he awoke he was dead.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Gluttony", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
